name: spawn_agent
description: Spawn a listed sub-agent, or an inline role when agents_dynamic is enabled. Always non-blocking: returns a handle immediately while the sub-agent runs in parallel; its result arrives later as a message, and you can cancel it with kill. Sub-agents share your token budget and cannot widen your tools without explicit runtime support.

agent.description: Name of the sub-agent to spawn (must be listed in the agents directory).

role.description: Inline role; mutually exclusive with agent and available only when agents_dynamic is enabled.

task.description: The task for the sub-agent to perform.

inputs.description: Artifacts to place into the sub-agent's workspace before it starts.
